about: Report a problem with documentation

---

## ?? Documentation Issue

**Which documentation has a problem?**

**URL:** [e.g., https://github.com/AHartTN/Hartonomous/blob/main/docs/architecture/cqrs-pattern.md]

## ?? What's Wrong?

**Describe the issue with the documentation**

- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Outdated content
- [ ] Typo / grammar error
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Confusing explanation
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Other: ___________

## ? Suggested Fix

**How should this be corrected?**

## ?? Additional Context

**Any other information that might be helpful**

## ?? Checklist

- [ ] I have verified this is a documentation issue (not a code bug)
- [ ] I have checked this isn't already fixed in the latest docs
- [ ] I have provided a clear description
